Signs of 'up fast, down slow'

Each dot is one month. In recent years, pump prices have surged with crude oil spikes but become

stickier on the way down – a pattern less visible before 2021 – the data shows

Brent crude

(US$/barrel)

120

100

2021 onwards

Cluster where

pump prices

stayed elevated

when crude fell

2011-2015

80

Feb 2026

May 2025

60

2016-2020

40

Singapore 95-octane

pump price (S$/litre)

20

1.8

2.0

2.2

2.4

2.6

2.8

3.0

3.2

3.4

Singapore pump prices are monthly averages across Shell, Caltex and SPC (Esso and Sinopec included where available). Brent crude prices are

monthly averages from the U.S. Energy Information Administration via Federal Reserve Economic Data.

Chart:

Wong Pei Ting

Source:

ChenLim.Com, U.S. Energy Information Administration
